title: SweetSource International Incoterms Guide
extracted_text: SweetSource exports seasonal confection inventory under FOB Origin for most domestic lanes. Title and risk transfer when the carrier accepts the freight at origin. Expedite requests require planner approval because premium freight is billed back to the buyer. When inbound demand risk is high, planners should compare FOB cost plus expedite surcharge against transfer and alternate supplier options.

title: CaliSnacks Supplier Lead Time Advisory
extracted_text: CaliSnacks current standard lead time is 18 days with high variability due to port congestion and co-pack scheduling. Alternate supplier activation is recommended when projected stockout falls inside 14 days and forecast uplift exceeds 15 percent. Incoterm is EXW, so outbound coordination and pickup timing materially affect effective replenishment lead time.

title: HydraCo Critical Vendor Recovery Memo
extracted_text: HydraCo critical hydration shipments currently operate on FOB Destination with standard lead time of 21 days. Service recovery actions should prioritize allocation and escalation when shortages are inside two weeks because no safe inbound acceleration is contractually guaranteed. Safety stock assumptions for critical hydration SKUs should be raised during hurricane or weather disruption periods.
